form.formComment: Recent form sound. Last start made ground from midfield; 3rd of 12 at Urawa on March 20 over 800m, 3.5 len behind Megu carrying 53kg at $5. form.formComment: Recent form sound. Returns from a 35-day let-up. Most recently favourite; won by a neck at this track March 2 over 900m defeating Magical Candy carrying 54kg at $2.50. The race before that sat on speed throughout when 3rd of 12 at this track on February 2 over 900m, 4 len behind Void with 54kg at $5.70. Big chance to make it back-to-back successes.
